drop table if exists report_jobs cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists tasks cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists tenant cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: drop sequence if exists users_seq Hibernate: create sequence users_seq start with 1 increment by 50 Hibernate: create table processed_messages (id bigint generated by default as identity, processed_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, consumer_name varchar(100) not null, message_id varchar(100) not null, primary key (id), unique (message_id, consumer_name)) Hibernate: create table projects (created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, tenant_id bigint not null, name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id), unique (name, tenant_id)) Hibernate: create table report_jobs (completed_at timestamp(6) with time zone, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, started_at timestamp(6) with time zone, tenant_id bigint not null, result_message varchar(1000), failure_reason varchar(2000), report_type varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) not null check ((status in ('QUEUED','PROCESSING','COMPLETED','FAILED'))), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table tasks (created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, project_id bigint not null, tenant_id bigint not null, version bigint, status varchar(255) not null, title varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table tenant (id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(255) unique, plan varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table users (id bigint not null, tenant_id bigint not null, email varchar(255), password varchar(255), role varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists tasks add constraint FKsfhn82y57i3k9uxww1s007acc foreign key (project_id) references projects 2026-05-18 13:05:00.800 [main] INFO
